programmes.show_description: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.
(2021) Zeitgeisty survival thriller. When the American economy tanks, oil prices plummet and the borders close, people start to panic...
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1989) Star-studded tragi-comedy with Julia Roberts, Daryl Hannah, Dolly Parton and more. Six Southern belles console and cajole each other through life in a Louisiana beauty parlour.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
(1992) Anthony Hopkins, Helena Bonham Carter and Emma Thompson star in James Ivory's adaptation of EM Forster's novel about two families, love, treachery and revenge.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(2010) Action-comedy starring Tom Cruise and Cameron Diaz. A CIA assassin kidnaps a woman and takes her on an impromptu round-the-world trip in order to save both their lives. Violence.
(2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.
(2022) Thriller starring Guy Pearce as a writer-in-hiding whose novel inspired a teenager to kill 13 people 25 years ago. And now he must revisit the past.
(2018) Dystopian sci-fi adventure. In a future where disease has killed most children and given the surviving youths superpowers, fearful adults lock teenagers in prison camps...
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Four children compete in two crafty upcycling challenges working with textiles. Only two will make it through to the semi-finals of Crafty Champions.
Teleshopping.
(1958) Brooding western starring Joan Collins and Gregory Peck. A man hunts down the four escaped prisoners who he believes are responsible for the murder of his wife.
(1956) Western. Richard Widmark plays a man who murdered the killers of his wife and children and who becomes the unlikely saviour of a wagon train that's attacked by Apaches.
(1948) Historical adventure. A man (Louis Hayward) returns from the Wars of the Roses to learn from his uncle that a family friend has killed his father. But is everything as it seems?
(1941) Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara and Roddy McDowall star in John Ford's multi-Oscar-winning period drama set in the mining communities of the South Wales Valleys of the 19th century.
(2001) Thriller with Owen Wilson. A US Navy flight officer on a NATO reconnaissance mission has to fend for himself when he's shot down by Serb forces in the former Yugoslavia. Violence.
(2023) Tense, fact-based thriller starring Tom Hanks as the captain of cargo ship Maersk Alabama, which was hijacked by Somali pirates on 8 April 2009, directed by Paul Greengrass.
